scripts.check: npm run check:js && npm run check:json && npm run check:i18n
scripts.check:js: node --check star-frontiers.mjs && node --check module/config.mjs && node --check module/data/fields.mjs && node --check module/data/character-data.mjs && node --check module/data/item-data.mjs && node --check module/sheets/character-sheet.mjs && node --check module/sheets/item-sheet.mjs && node --check tools/check-i18n.mjs
scripts.check:json: node -e "import fs from 'node:fs'; for (const file of ['system.json', 'lang/en.json']) JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(file, 'utf8'));"
